app_description: E2EE Chat is a platform for secure and private chat.

authentication.authFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
authentication.signUpFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again later.
authentication.copyPrivateKeyModalDescription: This private key is used to decrypt your messages. Copy and store it in a safe place. We cannot recover it for you.
authentication.copyPrivateKeyModalConfirmButton: I have safely stored my private key
authentication.copyPrivateKeyModalCheckboxDescription: I understand that if I lose this private key, I will lose access to my encrypted messages.

sidebar.searchAria: Search by username to start a chat

chat.loginOnThisDevice: [Sign in on this device to view]
chat.selectConversationPlaceholder: Select a conversation or start a new chat
chat.missingPrivateKeyError: Missing encryption key. Please enter your encryption key.
chat.missingRecipientPublicKeyError: Missing recipient public key. Cannot encrypt.
chat.sendNeedRecipientKey: Recipient public key is required to send
